'''dhavuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillatorian|oscillatorian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillatorian|oscillatorian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhavuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhævivith|dhævivith]] || [[word:dhævivij|dhævivij]] || [[word:dhævivish|dhævivish]] || [[word:dhævivi|dhævivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavuvuvuth|dhavuvuvuth]] || [[word:dhavuvuvuj|dhavuvuvuj]] || [[word:dhavuvuvush|dhavuvuvush]] || [[word:dhavuvuvu|dhavuvuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavuvuth|dhavuvuth]] || [[word:dhavuvuj|dhavuvuj]] || [[word:dhavuvush|dhavuvush]] || [[word:dhavuvu|dhavuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavufvuth|dhavufvuth]] || [[word:dhavufvuj|dhavufvuj]] || [[word:dhavufvush|dhavufvush]] || [[word:dhavufvuf|dhavufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavuvuthu|dhavuvuthu]] || [[word:dhavuvuju|dhavuvuju]] || [[word:dhavuvushu|dhavuvushu]] || [[word:dhavuvuku|dhavuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavuvuth|dhavuvuth]] || [[word:dhavuvuj|dhavuvuj]] || [[word:dhavuvush|dhavuvush]] || [[word:dhavuvu|dhavuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavuvuthul|dhavuvuthul]] || [[word:dhavuvujul|dhavuvujul]] || [[word:dhavuvushul|dhavuvushul]] || [[word:dhavuvukul|dhavuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavuvuthuthu|dhavuvuthuthu]] || [[word:dhavuvujuju|dhavuvujuju]] || [[word:dhavuvushushu|dhavuvushushu]] || [[word:dhavuvuku|dhavuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavuvuthun|dhavuvuthun]] || [[word:dhavuvujun|dhavuvujun]] || [[word:dhavuvushun|dhavuvushun]] || [[word:dhavuvukun|dhavuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavuvuthuoro|dhavuvuthuoro]] || [[word:dhavuvujuoro|dhavuvujuoro]] || [[word:dhavuvushuoro|dhavuvushuoro]] || [[word:dhavuvukuoro|dhavuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
